Localization.Description: Attempt to attach a file system to a virtual machine or detach it from a virtual machine

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} is unable to attach a file system to virtual machine {object.name} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is detaching a file system from virtual machine {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is attaching a file system to virtual machine {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} attached a file system to virtual machine {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to detach a file system from virtual machine {object.name} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} detached a file system from virtual machine {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
